    Shamal SathsaraShamal Sathsara • YouYou IT Undergraduate @ SLIATE | Python Programming Intern @ Decode Labs | Python, Node.js, MERN Stack| Experienced Team Supervisor | Full Stack DeveloperIT Undergraduate @ SLIATE | Python Programming Intern @ Decode Labs | Python, Node.js, MERN Stack| Experienced Team Supervisor | Full Stack Developer 2w • Edited • 2 weeks ago • Edited • Visible to anyone on or off LinkedIn
    I’m excited to share my latest full-stack learning project: a Laptop Price Predictor!
    My goal was to go beyond just training a model in a Jupyter notebook and actually build a complete, production-ready web application around it.

    My goal was to go beyond just training a model in a Jupyter notebook and actually build a complete, production-ready web application around it.
    Here is what I built from scratch:

    Machine Learning Pipeline: Engineered a robust scikit-learn pipeline with a ColumnTransformer to handle dirty data, perform one-hot encoding, and train a RandomForestRegressor.

    Backend API: Built a clean, modular backend using Flask (Python) to handle inference, validate form inputs, and fetch live exchange rates from an external API to calculate localized pricing (LKR).

    Frontend UI: Designed a modern, responsive "Glassmorphism" UI from scratch using Vanilla CSS and JavaScript, complete with micro-animations and seamless form handling.

    Clean Code Practices: Refactored the entire codebase to strictly follow PEP-8 standards, modularize functions, and include comprehensive developer documentation.

    Tech Stack: Python, Flask, scikit-learn, Pandas, HTML/CSS/JS.

    Check out the code on my GitHub: [ https://lnkd.in/gs_KrbyM ] Let me know what you think in the comments!

    hashtag#MachineLearning hashtag#WebDevelopment hashtag#Python hashtag#Flask hashtag#DataScience hashtag#FullStack hashtag#SoftwareEngineering

    Shamal SathsaraShamal Sathsara • YouYou IT Undergraduate @ SLIATE | Python Programming Intern @ Decode Labs | Python, Node.js, MERN Stack| Experienced Team Supervisor | Full Stack DeveloperIT Undergraduate @ SLIATE | Python Programming Intern @ Decode Labs | Python, Node.js, MERN Stack| Experienced Team Supervisor | Full Stack Developer 1mo • Edited • 1 month ago • Edited • Visible to anyone on or off LinkedIn
    NutriSnap AI Powered Mobile App with On-Device TensorFlow Lite & Firebase.

    Most fitness and nutrition tracking applications rely heavily on slow, cloud-dependent image recognition APIs which cost expensive subscription fees and compromise user privacy.
    NutriSnap solves this by putting the AI directly inside the user's pocket. It leverages an on-device TensorFlow Lite (TFLite) model to perform real-time food classification in milliseconds, completely offline. The data is saved instantly to local cache and synchronized seamlessly with Firebase Firestore whenever the user is online.

    Real Time Predictions: Capture food photos via camera or load from the gallery. The app processes the image and returns predictions instantly.
    EfficientNet Core: Runs an on-device TensorFlow Lite classifier trained on a highly diversified dataset (101 food classes including Apple Pie, Sushi, Ramen, Tacos, and custom local Sri Lankan specialties like Kottu, Kiribath, and Coconut Sambol).
    Multi-Class Confidence Bar: Displays the top 3 AI-matching guesses with dynamic confidence progress indicators.
    Smart Data Filtering: Employs a strict ≥60% confidence threshold to guarantee database accuracy and prevent misclassifications.
    Activate to view larger image,

    Built and Deployed a Custom WhatsApp Automation Bot: Aura_Bot.

    I’m excited to share Aura_Bot, a project I built to bridge the gap between student needs and digital resources. What started as a coding challenge in Node.js has evolved into a practical tool for gathering and managing university materials more effectively.

    Project Highlights:

    01.Resource Management: Designed to help students quickly access links, documents, and schedules within WhatsApp.

    02.Role-Based Logic: Implemented a secure permission system (Owner/Admin/User) to ensure the bot is used effectively within student groups.

    03.Develop Stack: Built using JavaScript and the whatsapp-web.js library, focusing on asynchronous event handling and reliability.

    This project has been an incredible way to apply my programming skills to a real-world problem within my university.

    hashtag#nodejs hashtag#javascript hashtag#automation hashtag#WebDev hashtag#SoftwareEngineering hashtag#StudentInnovation

    Project Name :- Operation Frontline.

    Operation Frontline is a PC-based 3D First-Person Shooting (FPS) game developed using Unreal Engine.

    This project focuses on delivering an immersive combat experience through realistic environments, responsive weapon mechanics, and engaging gameplay dynamics.

    Key highlights include:

    High-quality 3D FPS gameplay.
    Real-time combat mechanics and player controls.
    Optimized performance for PC platform.
    Built using Unreal Engine tools and systems.

    This project helped strengthen my skills in game design, level development, player mechanics, and Unreal Engine workflows, while emphasizing performance optimization and user experience.

    Team Member:- ( Chamika Chandeera )
